title: AEM 6850 · Fall 2026
text:
About
AEM 6850 — Empirical Methods for Applied Economists — is taught by Prof. Ariel Ortiz-Bobea at the Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics and Management, Cornell University.
For a sense of the format and tooling philosophy, see the related course AEM 7010 (Spring 2026).

title: AEM 6850
text:
AEM 6850


Empirical Methods for Applied Economists


A graduate course at Cornell on empirical methods for applied economics research — taught by Prof. Ariel Ortiz-Bobea, Charles H. Dyson School of Applied Economics and Management.
